rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type contracts in component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only for implementation-level bindings when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not invent declarations for unresolved references; use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
generic_rules: Maintain architectural integrity when inserting annex blocks
Follow scope rules for assumptions, guarantees, and bindings
Use valid syntax for AGREE annex blocks
Preserve existing component features and connections
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
Use `guarantee "label": expression;` for output dependency contracts
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not invent declarations for unresolved references
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AGREE assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports
AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
